name: Howard Quicksell
abstract: Howard Quicksell (December 22, 1901 – October 30, 1953) was an American composer and banjoist.

works_created.t: Will You, Won't You, Be My Babe?

about_quotes.speaker: William T. (Bill) Challis
about_quotes.evidence: we got a hell of a fine banjo player down there, Howdy Quicksell
